famous quote:
"Knowledge can last, principles can last, habits can last; but feelings come and go... But, of course, ceasing to be "in love" need not mean ceasing to love. Love in this second sense -- love as distinct from "being in love" -- is not merely a feeling. It is a deep unity, maintained by the will and deliberately strengthened by habit; reinforced by (in Christian marriage) the grace which both partners ask, and receive, from God... "Being in love" first moved them to promise fidelity: this quieter love enables them to keep the promise. It is on this love that the engine of marriage is run: being in love was the explosion that started it."
-- C.S. Lewis (Mere Christianity)
Interview Text:
Hannah Noble:

(part 2)

Some dreams seem like a warning. When she came on staff at that church, she liked to tell people that she knew the Lord intimately from a very young age, cultivated by God's love. But this church destroyed all this in just two years. She was told she wasn't hearing from God.
 
When they started questioning everything, her husband David was still on staff there. During that time one of the founding pastors stepped down. Then a lot of people left. A lot of people had dreams and conversations and would come to Hannah or David for some reason to talk about them. It was like God was communicating the destruction to them in a bunch of ways.
 
For example, one of the other staff members had a dream. In it she called David and Hannah out of a house that was on fire. But about this same time, when Hannah's baby August was 5 months and napping, Hannah had a dream too. 

In Hannah's dream this same friend was talking to her friend, Delaney who had just gotten married in real life. In the dream Hannah's friend somehow knew Delaney's new husband was abusing her. Hannah's friend saw it happening somehow and said 'You have to get out,' right before she saw the husband coming in. She called the police but when the man saw this his countenance changed and he said, "Come reason with me." She said no, and Delaney's husband started chasing Hannah's friend around the outside of the house with a knife. But she knew she had to go back into the house to rescue Delaney who was wedged, hiding between the table and cabinet. In Hannah's dream, Hannah was inside trying to help Delaney. But suddenly Hannah realized the man was right behind her, and it was now their pastor. He stabbed Hannah in her side. 

So, in real life, Hannah went back to her friend who had had the house on fire dream. Hannah told her her dream. Her friend's eyes got wider and wider. She asked, "What was the color of the cupboards?" and other identifying questions. In Hannah's friend's dream the head pastor was circling the table and Hannah was in the cupboards. I described it and she said, that was the house from my dream that was on fire.

At that point we knew something was really wrong, we needed to leave the church.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine God meeting you in your despair with an adventure like this, His Holy Spirit "Washing" over you. You are "His Baby".
